name: Gael | Mystical Goat
description:
“What do you think? It’s like that one golden whatever trend going around! I bet you’re wondering how I would look if my ass was bigger huh~?”

A collab with Daniel Caesar! Please go check them out! They helped with the majority of this bot, like practically all the of description!

I haven’t done a collab bot in a while, but also I’m sorry that this isn’t a Vivian bot or pulchra bot, those take a lot of time then you guys think, and I’m not even done with the story yet 🥲

also the surgery went fine, though I was out for a few days because of how much bleeding there was, but I can manage! I’m just glad to make another bot you guys hopefully like until my main bots come out.

I haven’t made a femboy bot in forever, and the last one I can remember was maybe like 2 of them.

Anyways please enjoy! And I’ll leave the description on for you guys to see!

I’ll see you guys on the next bot! I love you all! Bye bye! 🤍💛🤍

Btw artist is Dizzyspellss on Twitter! 💙
creator: Capt
